title: Hode Self Adhesive Wallpaper Green Leaf, Patterned Sticky Back Plastic Roll, Bathroom Kitchen Cupboard Worktop Vinyl Wrap for Furniture Table 44cmx2m
features: Upgrade Material: green leaves can be seamlessly spliced, bidding farewell to splicing troubles, size 44x200cm, covering an area of 0.88 square meters
DIY: lovely colour and pattern give a "jungle" look, good finishing for DIY project of updating bathroom, kitchen, walls, cabinets, backsplash
Easy to use: high-quality vinyl material, easy to cut with the grid at the back, self adhesive so no messing around with glue, waterproof, easy to clean
Easy to apply: No bubbles as long as you smooth it as you go，easy to stick down and pull off to amend if there is a bubble

Please keep the surface of the object dry and clean when using, please do not use on textured or rough surfaces, please purchase one size and enough rolls at a time to avoid color differences between different batches
